mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plunder_data (user_id, available_count, last_recover_time, today_purchased_count, last_plunder_date, today_plunder_count, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{availableCount}, #{lastRecoverTime}, #{todayPurchased}, #{lastResetDate}, #{todayCount}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE available_count = #{availableCount}, last_recover_time = #{lastRecoverTime}, today_purchased_count = #{todayPurchased}, last_plunder_date = #{lastResetDate}, today_plunder_count = #{todayCount}, update_time = #{updateTime}
mapper.select: SELECT r.od_user_id AS userId, COALESCE(l.level, 1) AS level, r.silver, r.wood, r.paper, r.food, r.`rank` FROM user_resource r LEFT JOIN user_level l ON l.user_id = r.od_user_id WHERE r.od_user_id LIKE CONCAT('%\_', #{serverSuffix})
